no_ledge_storage_type: Qdrant vector search (same backend as pipeliner KE) + markdown vault at ~/vault/ke
recommendation: DEPRECATE no-ledge plugin, KEEP pipeliner KE as canonical. Both use identical Qdrant backend + ~/vault/ke markdown vault. The no-ledge plugin (~/.hermes/plugins/no-ledge/) is a redundant wrapper that calls the same ke-tool.ts CLI that pipeliner KE uses directly. No-ledge adds zero differentiation — it uses _VAULT_ROOT=~/vault/ke and _KE_TOOL=~/projects/ke/bin/ke-tool.ts, which is the same infrastructure as pipeliner. hermes-kb at ~/projects/hermes-kb/ is DESIGN-ONLY (Phase 3 skeleton) and contains no implementation — should be treated as future migration target, not current KE. Canonical KE: ~/projects/ke/ (CLI) + ~/vault/ke/ (vault) + Qdrant collections 'kb' and 'ke'.
